he-bing-jiao.name: He Bing Jiao

jia-yi-fan.name: Jia Yi Fan

kyle-badminton.bio: Young creator focused on modern game tactics and fitness.

lee-chong-wei.name: Lee Chong Wei

lee-zii-jia.name: Lee Zii Jia
lee-zii-jia.bio: Malaysian men's singles ace, 2021 All England champion.

lin-dan.name: Lin Dan

liu-hui-ling-coach.name: Coach Liu Huiling

meng-yan-coach.bio: Female coach on Xiaohongshu/Douyin, technique details for women players.

tai-tzu-ying.name: Tai Tzu-ying
